publication_note: This dataset indexes selected public-review materials. Inclusion does not establish authenticity, guilt, causation, or a final legal conclusion.

records.title: Medical-record archive
records.summary: Full medical records are preserved outside the public repository for authorized legal and expert review.

provenance.notes: Source files are intentionally excluded from the public Git repository.

records.redaction_notes: Full records remain restricted. Any future public excerpt requires relevance review, executor authorization, third-party redaction, and publication logging.
records.publication_authority: Executor-controlled restricted archive; no blanket public publication authorization recorded in this dataset.
